ddls:
CREATE TABLE "government_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the government agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency's headquarters */,
  "agency_website" TEXT /* URL of the agency's official website */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agency's mission and responsibilities */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was established */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the agency */,
  "current_projects_count" INTEGER /* Number of current projects the agency is managing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract opportunity */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the government agency posting the opportunity */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of contract opportunity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract opportunity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the contract work will be performed */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the opportunity */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting bids */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and filtering */,
  "solicitation_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the solicitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_opportunities_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES contract_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_opportunities_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES government_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract award */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract opportunity that was awarded */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor that was awarded the contract */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was awarded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount awarded for the contract */,
  "contract_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the contract */,
  "amendment_count" INTEGER /* Number of amendments made to the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_awards_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES contract_opportunities ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_awards_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the contractor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the contractor's headquarters */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the contractor's official website */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contractor's services */,
  "date_founded" TEXT /* Date the contractor was founded */,
  "employees_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the contractor based on past performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract opportunity the bid is for */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor submitting the bid */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the bid was submitted */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount bid for the contract */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bid (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "bid_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bid */,
  "bid_document_url" TEXT /* URL or file path to the bid document */,
  "bid_evaluation_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the bid during evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES contractors ("contractor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES contract_opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  "minimum_bid_amount" REAL /* Minimum bid amount for the contract type */,
  "maximum_contract_duration" INTEGER /* Maximum duration for contracts of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract award the milestone is for */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone or deliverable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "milestone_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost for the milestone */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date the milestone was completed */,
  "completion_documents_url" TEXT /* URL or file path to documents verifying completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_milestones_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES contract_awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract award the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., wire transfer, check) */,
  "payment_reference_number" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_receipt_url" TEXT /* URL or file path to the payment receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES contract_awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract opportunity the document is associated with */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract award the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., RFP, contract agreement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_documents_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES contract_opportunities ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_documents_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES contract_awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement officer, contractor, admin) */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the government agency the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or list of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES government_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the information */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract opportunity accessed */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract award accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES contract_awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES contract_opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User or system that sent the notification */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
